ddls:
CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "inst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "inst_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of institution (e.g., private, public, community college) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the institution is located */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the institution (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the institution was founded */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the institution */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website URL */,
  "president" TEXT /* Name of the current president or chancellor */,
  "accreditation" TEXT /* Accreditation status */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admission_rates" (
  "admit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission rate record */,
  "inst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Academic year for which the admission rates are reported */,
  "acceptance_rate" REAL /* Acceptance rate of the institution */,
  "top25perc" INTEGER /* Percentage of students in the top 25% of their high school class */,
  "top10perc" INTEGER /* Percentage of students in the top 10% of their high school class */,
  "application_count" INTEGER /* Number of applications received */,
  "enrollment_count" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled */,
  "yield_rate" REAL /* Percentage of accepted students who enroll */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admission_rates_inst_id FOREIGN KEY ("inst_id") REFERENCES institutions ("inst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "graduation_rates" (
  "grad_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each graduation rate record */,
  "inst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Academic year for which the graduation rates are reported */,
  "grad_rate" INTEGER /* Graduation rate of the institution */,
  "outstate" INTEGER /* Out-of-state tuition fees */,
  "room_board" INTEGER /* Room and board fees */,
  "retention_rate" REAL /* First-year student retention rate */,
  "transfer_out_rate" REAL /* Rate of students transferring out */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grad_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graduation_rates_inst_id FOREIGN KEY ("inst_id") REFERENCES institutions ("inst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financials" (
  "fin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "inst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Academic year for which the financial data is reported */,
  "expend" INTEGER /* Expenditure per student */,
  "enroll" INTEGER /* Enrollment number */,
  "books" INTEGER /* Books and supplies cost */,
  "total_revenue" INTEGER /* Total revenue of the institution */,
  "total_expenses" INTEGER /* Total expenses of the institution */,
  "endowment" INTEGER /* Endowment value */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financials_inst_id FOREIGN KEY ("inst_id") REFERENCES institutions ("inst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "stud_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student record */,
  "inst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Academic year for which the student data is reported */,
  "f_undergrad" INTEGER /* Number of full-time undergraduate students */,
  "p_undergrad" INTEGER /* Number of part-time undergraduate students */,
  "female_count" INTEGER /* Number of female students */,
  "male_count" INTEGER /* Number of male students */,
  "international_count" INTEGER /* Number of international students */,
  "minority_count" INTEGER /* Number of minority students */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stud_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_inst_id FOREIGN KEY ("inst_id") REFERENCES institutions ("inst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address */,
  "role" TEXT /* User role (e.g., researcher, policymaker, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "perm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource the permission applies to (e.g., institutions, admission_rates) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("perm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
